Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /fcmetrics to open the window.
Changelog:
Replaced the GreenZone inactive tooltip with a custom rounded speech bubble.
Kept the bubble no wider than the overlay.
Centered the reminder text inside an 80% black bubble with a downward pointer.
